channel.title: latitude on Ahmad Jamali
channel.description: Recent content in latitude on Ahmad Jamali

item.title: Kali Linux Will Not Boot on Dell Latitude E7450
item.description: I wanted to install Kali Linux version 2019.2 on a Dell Latitude E7450. The installation is pretty straight forward once you are able to create a bootable USB drive and boot off of it. I download the Kali ISO (Kali Linux 64-Bit) and used Etcher to flash the ISO on the USB flash drive. Inserted the USB in the USB port and pressed F12 on the keyboard to go to the one time boot menu, selected the USB to boot off of and selected to install Kali.
